num_qubits = metadata["num_input_qubits"]
num_states = 2 ** num_qubits
expected_probability = 1.0 / num_states
tolerance = 0.05  # Tolerance for statistical fluctuations

assert len(counts) == num_states, f"Expected {num_states} states, found {len(counts)}"
for state, prob in counts.items():
    assert abs(prob - expected_probability) < tolerance, f"State {state} probability {prob} deviates from expected {expected_probability}"

num_states = 2**metadata["num_input_qubits"]
expected_probability = 1.0 / num_states
tolerance = 0.05

for state_int in range(num_states):
    state_bin = format(state_int, f'0{metadata["num_input_qubits"]}b')
    actual_probability = counts.get(state_bin, 0)
    assert abs(actual_probability - expected_probability) < tolerance, \
        f"State {state_bin} has probability {actual_probability}, expected approx {expected_probability}"
